content.tagline: Keeping Your Vessel Running Season After Season
content.about:
Ben's Boatworks is a full-service marine facility based in Annapolis, MD, dedicated to keeping your vessel in peak operating condition year-round. We offer a comprehensive range of specialized marine services for boat owners who expect reliable, knowledgeable work done right the first time. Whether you're docked in the Chesapeake Bay area or cruising the waters of South Florida, we're built to handle what your boat needs.

Our team specializes in Boat Surveying & Inspection, Diving & Underwater Services, Marine AC & Climate Control, and Marine Plumbing & Sanitation. From pre-purchase surveys and hull inspections to underwater hull cleaning and zinc replacement, we cover what's above and below the waterline. We keep your onboard climate systems running efficiently in the Florida heat, and we handle everything from holding tank repairs to full marine sanitation system overhauls — the kind of work that keeps your boat compliant and comfortable.

At Ben's Boatworks, we understand that your boat represents a significant investment, and we treat it that way. We serve boat owners across South Florida and the greater Annapolis, MD region, working with a wide range of vessel types and sizes. Our commitment is straightforward: show up prepared, do the work properly, and make sure you're back on the water with confidence. If you're looking for a marine services partner who takes your boat as seriously as you do, we're ready to help.
content.seoTitle: Ben's Boatworks | Boat Surveying & Inspection Annapolis, MD
content.seoDescription: Ben's Boatworks in Annapolis, MD offers boat surveying, diving services, marine AC & plumbing across South Florida. Call us today!

serviceDescriptions.Boat Surveying & Inspection: Ben's Boatworks provides thorough boat surveys and inspections covering hull integrity, mechanical systems, electrical components, and overall vessel condition. Whether you need a pre-purchase survey, insurance survey, or condition-and-value assessment, our detailed reports give you a clear picture of what you're working with. A proper inspection protects your investment and helps you make informed decisions before buying or insuring a vessel.
serviceDescriptions.Diving & Underwater Services: Our diving and underwater services cover hull cleaning, zinc anode inspection and replacement, propeller checks, and underwater damage assessment without hauling the vessel out of the water. Regular underwater maintenance helps prevent marine growth buildup, corrosion, and drive system wear that can go unnoticed until it becomes a costly repair. We handle both routine underwater upkeep and emergency underwater inspections as needed.
serviceDescriptions.Marine AC & Climate Control: Ben's Boatworks installs, services, and repairs marine air conditioning and climate control systems to keep your cabin comfortable in warm weather conditions. We work on chilled water systems, self-contained marine AC units, and ventilation components, diagnosing issues with refrigerant levels, seawater cooling circuits, and electrical connections. Properly maintained marine HVAC systems run more efficiently and last significantly longer.
serviceDescriptions.Marine Plumbing & Sanitation: Our marine plumbing and sanitation services include holding tank repairs and replacements, through-hull fitting inspections, raw water system maintenance, and full marine sanitation device (MSD) servicing. We ensure your onboard plumbing is leak-free, properly vented, and compliant with marine sanitation regulations. From freshwater systems to waste management, we keep everything flowing the way it should.

content.serviceAreaDescription: Ben's Boatworks is based in Annapolis, MD and provides mobile marine services throughout South Florida within a 60-mile radius.
commonProjects: Pre-purchase boat survey and full condition inspection report
Underwater hull cleaning and zinc anode replacement dive
Marine air conditioning system diagnosis and refrigerant recharge
Holding tank replacement and marine sanitation system overhaul

Through-hull fitting inspection and raw water plumbing repair
Propeller and running gear inspection via underwater dive service
